TKT-001.subject: Duplicate charge for my last order

messages.text: Hello, I believe I was charged twice for my recent order (ORD-001). Can you please look into this and issue a refund for the extra charge? Thank you.
Hi, I am trying to reschedule my appointment with Patient User (BK-002) for next week, but the system is giving me an error. Can you please assist?
Hi Dr. Rafia, we've looked into it. The patient's requested slot was unavailable. We have now manually rescheduled it for you for Aug 26th at 10:00 AM as requested. Please let us know if that works.
That works perfectly. Thank you for the quick help!
